title: Daplow's Mob Revamp
description: Adds more uses to Vanilla Mobs in Minecraft.
body:
# Mob Revamp

This Mod adds uses to Vanilla mobs.  This mod adds new items, blocks, and potions for certain mobs. 

### Great mod to add to Modpacks!!
### 
**Trying to add more and more mobs.  Check [Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/@Daplow111) channel for more information.**
## Current added:
- **10** new items
- **2** new block
- **3** new potions
- **1** new weapon
- **2** new chestplate
- **1** new leggings
- **2** new structures
### - **7** mobs revamped

## **Updates**:
### **Rabbit Update** 
![Rabbit Info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5903c6ff9f4e6c2ce0e6287b97161f0a4b8c38f7_0.webp)

This mod is for **Fabric** 

**Requires**: **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)** (0.77.0)

**YouTube**: [@Daplow111](https://www.youtube.com/@Daplow111)
